name: XPO, Inc.
business: XPO, Inc., together with its subsidiaries, is a leading provider of freight transportation services, with company-specific avenues for value creation. We use our proprietary technology to move goods efficiently through supply chains for approximately 55,000 customers in North America and Europe.

exposures.sentence: We developed new linehaul models that use artificial intelligence (AI) to improve the efficiency of our freight flows
XPO Smart is our proprietary suite of intelligent tools and analytics that self-adjusts site by site to drive productivity across our LTL service center operations.
In Europe, we have more than 150 all-electric trucks currently deployed supported by the existing and ongoing installation of more than 350 electric charging stations at our facilities.
Additionally, we have a natural gas-powered fleet of 280 trucks serving customers in France, the U.K., Spain and Portugal.
A significant breach of our information security systems, networks or processes could materially adversely affect our business.
XPO, Inc., together with its subsidiaries, is a leading provider of freight transportation services.

Our customers span every major industry, giving us valuable strongholds in verticals that are fundamental to the economy, such as industrial and manufacturing, retail and e-commerce, food and beverage, and consumer goods.
an increase in the nearshoring of manufacturing activity to North America

catalysts.event: Capital expenditures guidance of $500-$600 million in 2026
catalysts.sentence: We anticipate gross capital expenditures to be between $500 million and $600 million in 2026, funded by cash on hand and available liquidity.

catalysts.event: Extension of securitization program maturity to March 2029
catalysts.sentence: In January 2026, the program was amended to extend the maturity date through March 2029.

catalysts.event: Expect to receive $3 million tax refund in 2026
catalysts.sentence: We expect to receive the remaining $3 million cash refund in 2026.

tamClaims.claim: The U.S. LTL market is estimated to be $53 billion in 2024.
tamClaims.sentence: XPO has one of the largest LTL networks in North America, with approximately 9% share of the U.S. market, estimated to be $53 billion in 2024.
